seo_title: Remote payroll startup grows revenue 50% per employee without adding…
meta_description: Payroll service provider Remote surpassed $300 million in annual recurring revenue and became cash-flow positive thanks to a 50% increase in revenue per…
body_html:
Remote surpassed $300 million in annual recurring revenue and became cash-flow positive thanks to a 50% increase in revenue per employee resulting from AI adoption.

AI-powered automation Improved customer service Increased efficiency

Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) $300 million

The growth of Remote's revenue per employee is expected to have a positive impact on the company's ability to attract and retain top talent. The use of AI in payroll processing is likely to become more widespread in the industry, leading to increased efficiency and productivity.

source.title: Payroll startup Remote says it grew revenue 50% per employee without adding headcount
source.summary: Remote, a payroll startup, has achieved significant growth, surpassing $300 million in annual recurring revenue and becoming cash-flow positive. This success is attributed to a notable 50% increase in revenue per employee, which was driven by the adoption of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies within the company. Despite this growth, Remote did not add any new headcount to achieve its financial milestones.
